keyFindings.description: gh pr review --comment (pull_request_review) events NOT routed through Envoy — only issue_comment events delivered. Workers expecting PR review notifications will miss them.
@mention comments route exclusively to mention topic, NOT duplicated on issue comment topic. Workers subscribed to issue.N.> will miss @mention comments.
No automated CI-runnable E2E test for full delivery chain — regression risk
Issue spec curl example uses incorrect prompt_async format (message vs parts array)
Self-subscription code path not directly exercised — only delivery path tested via manual subscription
